name: InputField
description: A feature-rich input field component with floating labels, gradient colors, validation states, icons, and currency display support.

label.description: Floating label text that appears above the input when focused or filled

onChange.description: Change handler called when input value changes

type.description: HTML input type (text, password, email, number, color, etc.)

placeholder.description: Placeholder text (only shown when noLabel is true)

noLabel.description: If true, hides the floating label and shows placeholder instead

isValid.description: Validation state - when false, shows error color

borderRadius.description: Border radius in pixels (number as string)

color.description: Label and border color when input has value but not focused

inactiveColor.description: Label and border color when input is empty and not focused

activeColor.description: Label and border color when input is focused (supports gradients)

errorColor.description: Label and border color when isValid is false

labelBackground.description: Background color for the floating label

inputStyle.description: Additional styles for the input element

labelStyle.description: Additional styles for the label element

icon.description: Icon element to display alongside the input

setIconColors.description: Callback to set icon colors based on input state

advanced.title: Controlled input with validation
Input with gradient active state
advanced.description: Input with gradient color when focused

advanced.title: Input without label
advanced.description: Input with placeholder instead of floating label

advanced.title: Color picker input
advanced.code:
<InputField
  name="color"
  label="Choose color"
  type="color"
  value="#3b82f6"
  onChange={(e) => setColor(e.target.value)}
/>
advanced.description: Special color input with visual preview

advanced.title: Input with icon
advanced.description: Input with icon that changes color based on state

cssVariables.name: --bg
cssVariables.description: Border color (changes based on focus/validation state)

aria: aria-invalid - Should be added based on isValid prop
aria-describedby - Can be added to link error messages
accessibility.notes: Label is properly associated with input via htmlFor attribute. Consider adding aria-invalid when isValid is false.

notes: The component manages its own internal state for focus and input value
Label automatically floats when input is focused or has a value
Supports CSS gradients for activeColor prop
The type='color' input has special UI treatment with color preview
Currency is displayed using GradientText with dynamic colors
Icon colors are automatically updated based on input state via setIconColors callback
